best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-system-016 title: user generates a report with data compression issues module: system source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9 preconditions: a user is logged into the system. test data: user inputs data that cannot be compressed. test steps: 1. user logs into the system. 2. user selects a report generation option. 3. user inputs data that cannot be compressed. 4. reportmanager processes the request. 5. datamanager attempts to fetch the required data but encounters compression issues. 6. webserver displays an error message. expected result: the system displays an error message indicating compression issues.
